case_title: MODOLO, RICHARD vs. JOSE ALDO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $114.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 503 CORTLAND AVE #1, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE
DECLARATION OF RICHARD MODOLO FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CORRECT DEFT'S NAME TO JOSE ALDO RAMIREZ, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF RICHARD MODOLO FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD SERVED SEP-09-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE $3,341.66 RENT, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $192.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,194.16
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODOLO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ALDO EVA RAMIREZ AKA EVA SANTIESTEBAN B AKA EVA BUSTAMANTE
